subcodes.first_line: O Jalíl! Upon thee be My glory! On this day, which is the third of the Festival of Ramadán, the Greater Branch hath attained unto Our presence in thy stead [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا جلیل علیک بهائی امروز که روز سیم عید رمضانست غصن اکبر بنیابت شما بحضور
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @prayer for women, @call to action, @rejection, opposition and persecution
